Breadcrumb
Home
Work With Us

Looking for a meaningful job, a caring work environment and an opportunity to ignite your potential? By working with the Y, whether through our Child Care Centres, Community Hubs, Camp Stephens or Community Programs, you will enjoy opportunities to shine in a work environment that embraces diverse perspectives and talents. If you want to work with great people and make a difference, then the Y is the place for you!

Benefits vary according to eligibility and may include:

A comprehensive benefits package comparable to some of Canada’s best employers
A generous vacation entitlement that increases with years of service
Complimentary individual membership to our Community Hubs with available family add-on so you can enjoy all our health, fitness and aquatics services
Flexible schedules
An employer-matching pension plan
The opportunity to participate in programs to advance your training and develop on your career path
Great people, fun and rewarding work!

Discover Current Opportunities

For Current Staff: To view and apply for positions as a current employee, please log in to UKG and click "My Company", then "View Opportunit
